mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, created_at AS createdAt, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE lat IS NULL OR lng IS NULL

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY store_name

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, category, store_phone AS storePhone, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`store` ORDER BY store_name
